overall.description: A continuous aerial flight through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, viewed from inside a flying vehicle cockpit. The vehicle navigates between towering skyscrapers adorned with vibrant neon advertisements and holographic displays, transitioning from narrow urban canyons to open panoramic city views with distant mountains visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow aerial corridor between neon-lit skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle through tight gaps between towering buildings with heavy neon signage

large curved digital billboard displaying advertisements
industrial building illuminated with green neon lighting
futuristic cockpit dashboard with illuminated controls and displays

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates through a narrow urban canyon between towering cyberpunk skyscrapers. Bright red and green neon lights illuminate the building facades while holographic advertisements float in the tight space. The cockpit dashboard is visible at the bottom of the frame, indicating a first-person perspective from the pilot's seat.

scene_state.functional_zone: open aerial space above highway with mountain backdrop

events.description: exits narrow building corridor into open air revealing panoramic city view and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: flying vehicle ascends into open airspace, gaining altitude above the city streets

entered.detail: multi-level highway system with moving traffic lights visible in the distance
dark silhouette of mountains visible on the horizon beyond the city
distinctive skyscraper with large white 05 marking near the top

segments.scene_description: The vehicle breaks free from the enclosed corridor into open air, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the sprawling cyberpunk metropolis. An elevated highway system stretches below while distant mountains form a dark backdrop against the night sky. The tall tower marked with 05 becomes visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial highway corridor with landmark tower 05

events.description: vehicle banks left while passing tower 05, revealing industrial smokestack with emissions
approaching tower 03 as lighting shifts to darker industrial district with fewer neon signs

agents.ego_description: navigating through city airspace, banking around tall structures and maintaining altitude above the highway

entered.detail: tall industrial chimney emitting white smoke or steam into the night air
skyscraper with large white 03 marking visible on the facade
large circular structure with bright interior lighting visible below

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues its flight through the open city airspace, passing close to the landmark tower marked 05. An industrial chimney with visible smoke emissions appears on the left as the vehicle banks. The environment gradually transitions toward a darker industrial district as the tower marked 03 comes into view on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district with highway interchange and construction cranes

agents.ego_description: flying steadily through darker industrial sector with reduced neon lighting and more utilitarian structures

entered.detail: tall construction crane silhouetted against the night sky
low-rise industrial structure with red warning lights on the roof

segments.scene_description: The vehicle flies through a darker, more industrial section of the city with fewer neon advertisements and more utilitarian architecture. The highway interchange sprawls below while construction cranes and industrial buildings with red warning lights dot the landscape. The tower marked 03 remains a prominent landmark on the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight from a claustrophobic neon corridor into a vast, industrial urban expanse. It begins within a narrow urban canyon, where the cockpit dashboard frames a view of towering skyscrapers adorned with vibrant red and green neon lights and floating holographic advertisements. As the vehicle breaks free from the enclosed corridor, the scene opens into a breathtaking panoramic view of the sprawling metropolis, revealing an elevated highway system below and dark mountains on the horizon. The camera then banks past a landmark tower marked 05 and an emitting industrial chimney, shifting the environment toward a darker district. Finally, the flight progresses into a utilitarian industrial zone characterized by construction cranes and red warning lights, with tower 03 remaining a prominent landmark against the dimming city lights.
